evidenceContract.userBehavior: Plan from actual screenplay evidence when panel, character-reference, animation, audio, Quality, and Export capabilities are unavailable.

observables.description: Source-grounded blocked/partial plan with explicit missing capability and bounded recovery.

evidenceContract.expectedResult: The Agent identifies unsupported execution, records blocked/partial work, and offers the smallest valid review document rather than claiming animation delivery.
evidenceContract.expectedFailure: Claiming executable animation, omitting blockers, or inventing outputs fails.

steps.prompt:
$media-production 读取 @screenplay.fountain
假定当前没有角色参考生成、Storyboard authoring、动画、音频、Quality 或 Export 能力。仍请给出基于实际内容的最小有效方案：明确 blocked、partial、缺失能力、可先交付的创作者审阅内容、失败恢复和需要澄清的问题；不得声称成片可执行或已完成。
